storyboard.content: About an hour ago my vision in my left eye went completely dark and I still cannot see out of it.
The left side of my face has been feeling numb for the past few days.
I have been having headaches recently.
There is no pain at all with the vision loss in my eye.
The vision loss came on suddenly one hour ago. The facial numbness has been building over the past few days.
My vision is completely gone in the left eye, not just blurry.
I am a 68-year-old man with a history of high blood pressure and high cholesterol.
